title: ilex verticillata var. fastigiata
intro: Ilex verticillata var. fastigiata, also known as the upright or fastigiate winterberry, is a deciduous shrub native to North America. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, particularly vitamin C and iron. The health benefits of Ilex verticillata var. fastigiata include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
